MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE FACILITY SERVICES, LLC's Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Innovative Facility Services' unopposed motion for leave to file a cross complaint is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE FACILITY SERVICES, LLC's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is adopted as follows: Off calendar. Failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B (courtesy copies). Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Nguyen. Matter not reported. (301/RCE)
